description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a single stage named publish and a publish job that runs in this stage. The job executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update, apt-get install jq -y, cat tsconfig.json | jq 'del(.references)' > a && mv a tsconfig.json, npm ci, npx commitlint --from=master to=CI_BUILD_REF_NAME, npm run build, and npx semantic-release to automatically publish the package. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
